info.name: text-delete
info.text: A theory must be constructed with caution.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: Your theory is a house of cards.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Your theory is a house of cards.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: Your theory is a house of cards.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: A theory must be worked on similar to a house of cards.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: She was too stupid to understand my theory.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: A theory requires careful planning and thought to create.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: You need to have a good foundation to build upon.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: A  theory needs to have a good foundation before it is built upon.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: They use that theory a lot around here.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: A theory can serve as a model for many more trains of thought.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: A theory can have weak points if not properly analyzed.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: His theory collapsed under the weight of evidence.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: A theory unless structurally sound can collapse under the weight of evidence.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: It's a solid theory, but it's not very architectural.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: A theory may be solid, but it is not always guaranteed to hold over time.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: You have to tear down the old framework and build a new one.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Sometimes with new evidence, you have to tear down the old framework of a theory and create a new one.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: When he is finished, his theory will be as strong as the Empire State Building.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: When he is finished, his theory will be as

info.name: text-delete
info.text: strong as the Empire State Building.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: A well thought out theory similar to an well designed bridge, can withstand scrutiny and the test of time

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Without using physical force, criticism can destroy flimsy theories.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: We'll need to add more floors to that structure.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Theories are added upon given enough information and materials that support it.
